videos.title: JavaScript Form Validation Tutorial
videos.description: Complete guide to JavaScript form validation covering the Constraint Validation API, custom validation, and real-time validation patterns.

videos.title: HTML5 Form Validation - Constraint Validation API
videos.description: In-depth tutorial on HTML5 constraint validation covering required, pattern, min/max, custom validity, and the ValidityState object.

videos.title: Form Validation with JavaScript
videos.description: Brad Traversy demonstrates building a form with full client-side validation including error messages, CSS styling, and submission handling.

videos.title: CSS Form Validation Styling Tips
videos.description: Learn how to style form validation states with CSS pseudo-classes :valid, :invalid, :required, and create beautiful validation feedback.

videos.title: Building a Form Validator in JavaScript
videos.description: Step-by-step tutorial on building a reusable form validation library in vanilla JavaScript with support for multiple rule types.

videos.title: Form Validation Best Practices
videos.description: Best practices for form validation UX including timing, error message placement, accessibility, and keyboard navigation.

videos.title: The Constraint Validation API Explained
videos.description: Deep dive into the Constraint Validation API explaining ValidityState properties, setCustomValidity, and checkValidity methods.
